title.en: The strength of the Stygian Ancient Demon is st...

content.en:
The strength of the Stygian Ancient Demon is still above that of the Noble Wind Ancient Demon, but it is not too strong.

After all, when you reach the peak of the Ancient Demon level powerhouse realm, as long as you get it for a long enough time, you will be able to raise all aspects to the limit.

For example, the Ultimate Rule Realm is all in the Perfection Realm, and there are many peak Ultimate Arcanes, as well as the Form Secret Method, which is also cultivated to the current limit.

And in terms of ultimate will, it has also been raised to the limit of what can be improved.

Therefore, the difference in strength is not very large, only a very small number of peak ancient demon-level powerhouses once had insufficient foundations, and did not create their own form secret methods, and they could not form the most perfect foundation when they were created in the later stage, resulting in poor combat effectiveness.

However, the difference in the strength of the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses is often the restraint relationship between the peak ultimate arcane and the strength of the life pattern.

There is no doubt that the life pattern of the Stygian Ancient Demon is more powerful, and she also has a peak ultimate arcane that is very close to the ultimate arcane of the extreme path, which is why she has terrifying combat power.

31 If it was a normal time, it would be impossible for the Stygian Ancient Demon to kill the Nuofeng Ancient Demon, and even if the three peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses joined forces, they would still not be able to kill the Nuofeng Ancient Demon.

However, the Noble Wind Ancient Demon was trapped by the Ultimate Space-Time Killing Array at the moment, so there was hope to kill him.

Rumble!!!!

The Ultimate Time and Space Killing Array was urged with all its might, and the terrifying power acted on the Nuofeng Ancient Demon, and the ultimate particles on his body seemed to be shattered.

However, he still relied on his strong strength to withstand the attack of the Ultimate Space-Time Killing Array.

But at this time, the Stygian Ancient Demon made a move, and as soon as he made a move, it was the most powerful peak ultimate arcane.

Thundered!!!

The Noble Wind Ancient Demon's Ultimate Rule Domain was shattered, the Formation Secret Method was crushed, and the body was directly penetrated, and the injuries were not light.

Under the suppression of the Ultimate Time and Space Killing Array, the strength of the Stygian Ancient Demon was equivalent to ten times that of the Bino Wind Ancient Demon, completely crushing the Nuo Wind Ancient Demon.

Now.

The Nuofeng Ancient Demon showed despair, and the Ultimate Time and Space Killing Array was cut off from all information, and he couldn't ask for help, even if he had a clone, it was useless, and all information was blocked.

So, this time he was in a catastrophe.

"Stygian Ancient Demon, if you let me go, I can help you deal with the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses of the other main divisions!"

Norfeng Ancient Demon said.

"Impossible, a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse like you is too difficult to kill, if you kill one, it is enough for me to increase a lot of qi luck power, I can't let you go!"

As time passed, the Nuofeng Ancient Demon's life-saving hole cards were exhausted one by one.

Ultimately.

The body of the Noble Wind Ancient Demon was completely shattered and fell here.

And the luck of the Stygian Ancient Demon skyrocketed, and at the same time, the luck of the space-time Ancient Demon Pillar of the main department of Arrow Mother skyrocketed.

"Let's go, go back!"

The Ancient Demon Path.

And Ye Tian also followed the Stygian Ancient Demon and them back, after all, the Stygian Ancient Demon consumed a lot, and the other two peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses also consumed a lot in order to maintain the ultimate space-time killing array.

So, at this time, you have to go back and recover.

......

Dom Fortress.

The news of the fall of the Norfeng Ancient Demon was soon known to the main department of Dom, and the news spread throughout the Dom Fortress.

"What, how could Lord Nuofeng Ancient Demon fall, who could kill him?"

"This must be a rumor!"

"It's the news announced by the Ultimate Ancient Demons of the Dom Headquarters, and Lord Norfeng Ancient Demons has indeed fallen!"

"It's over, the Nuofeng Ancient Demon has fallen, and it is impossible for the main body of Dom to compete for the first place in the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space!"

"Who killed Lord Nuofeng Ancient Demon?"

Soon, the news of the Stygian Ancient Demon killing the Noble Wind Ancient Demon came, which made Dom's main department very angry, but he couldn't help the Stygian Ancient Demon.

However, the news of the fall of such powerhouses as Nuofeng Ancient Demons still shocked the other main departments, after all, since this time-space Ancient Demon Pillar luck battle, the number of fallen peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses is still rare, and the ones who have fallen are the kind of peak-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who have lived for a long time but are not very strong.

And a strong man like Nuofeng Ancient Demon was killed for the first time.

The war that followed was even more brutal, and the other main divisions wanted to surpass the main division of the Arrow, but no one wanted to sacrifice themselves.

Therefore, it is almost unrealistic to want to kill another peak ancient demon-level powerhouse.

In this way, as the time from the end of the battle for the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space became closer and closer, many peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses also knew that they had no hope of winning the place, so they did not come out and gave up directly.

this day.

An inexplicable fluctuation swept through the entire Huoxi space-time battlefield, and a terrifying space-time ancient demon pillar stood between heaven and earth, and the majestic luck shrouded the Arrowmu Fortress.

Immediately after, the huge space-time ancient demon pillar fell into the Aromu Fortress and was held by the Stygian Ancient Demon in his hands.

In the next few years, she can use this space-time ancient demon pillar to impact the ultimate ancient demon realm, but after a period of time, this space-time ancient demon pillar will return to the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and no one can stop it.

Even if the ultimate ancient demon-level powerhouse had tried to intercept the space-time ancient demon pillar, he was still escaped by the space-time ancient demon pillar.

For countless years, the three hundred and sixty-five main divisions have abandoned this idea.

......

"Hahaha, the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, I can use it to impact the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm!"

The Ancient Demon was very excited.

While it's possible that she could fail and fall, this is her most promising breakthrough ever, so she has to give it a try.

"Congratulations to the Stygian Ancient Demon!"

"Congratulations to the Stygian Ancient Demon!"

"Congratulations to the Stygian Ancient Demon!"

1. The 777 peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouses congratulated one after another.

"Thank you!"

The Ancient Demon of the Stygian thanked.

Among them, there were many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses who knew that there was little hope, so they came to help her, otherwise, she would not have been able to obtain this place.

Followed by.

The Ancient Demon of Stygian Elegance took the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space and went to retreat.

Of course, before the retreat, she still redeemed all the rewards that should be redeemed.

......

Eagle Ministry.

Ye Tian did not stay in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, he came back with a large amount of resources, and planned to retreat and cultivate here for a period of time.

At the same time, he was preparing to refine the Nightmare Rama Flower, and with the help of this treasure, his strength would definitely skyrocket.

Immediately, he asked a replica body that had already broken through to the ancient demon level to refine this Nightmare Mora Flower.

He swallowed it directly, and then refined it.

I saw that this Nightmare Rama Flower frantically absorbed his Ancient Demon-level origin and potential, and wisps of golden light merged into his ultimate will.

His aura was weakening, but the golden light in his ultimate will put him in a special state.

At this moment, his comprehension has improved infinitely.

He wasted no time and immediately comprehended the realm of the ultimate rules.
